title: Monday.com CRM email tracking not delivering email

posts.author: MJFZPT (Mark Fraser)
posts.cookedHtml:
When enabling email tracking in CRM, emails are not being delivered. Any suggestions?

Message in ‘failed’ receipt is:
Remote Server returned ‘550 5.7.708 Service unavailable. Access denied, traffic not accepted from this IP. For more information please go to Email non-delivery reports and SMTP errors in Exchange Online | Microsoft Learn AS(7230) [CWLP123MB2739.GBRP123.PROD.OUTLOOK.COM]’
